items.title: Phase 4 / §7.7: Local search infrastructure (ripgrep over local clone + daemon grep RPC fallback)
Phase 13: Polished empty / loading / error states across all stages
Phase 13: Onboarding tour + demo project + documentation
Phase 5: Plan quality tracker (intent / architecture / workflow / implementation / testing / risk / bead-readiness)
Phase 4: Local clone settings card + cache view + per-project actions
[analytical][MEDIUM] Direct preload channel payloads are unconstrained generics
[analytical][HIGH] Navigation guard permits arbitrary file:// documents under preload
Phase 3: Wizard VPS connect step (host/port/user form + tunnel TOFU)
[analytical][HIGH] Tending CLI runs scheduler with no-op runner
[analytical-round2][MEDIUM] br conformance tests validate raw CLI envelopes instead of BeadListResponse
[analytical][HIGH] Bearer session revocation is memory-only across daemon restart
[analytical][MEDIUM] Scheduler dispatch detaches run lifecycle from caller cancellation
[analytical][MEDIUM] IPC parity tests never compare manual contract to generated contract
[analytical][HIGH] Power assertion preload channels drift from preload-api.yaml
[analytical-round2][MEDIUM] Mock daemon project list bypasses ProjectListResponse schema
[analytical][LOW] NTM adapter file owns too many transport and parser responsibilities
[analytical][LOW] projects service mixes store, import, readiness, RU discovery, and file writers
[analytical][MEDIUM] Idempotency contract test treats unrouted write endpoints as success
[analytical][LOW] planning pipeline file combines orchestration, artifact IO, concurrency, and quality scoring
[analytical][MEDIUM] Daemon harness smoke passes green when the daemon binary is missing
Phase 5: Sync wizard step-followup bead-graph naming (hp-o6q-* → real bead ids)
[analytical-round2][HIGH] Mock Flywheel capability fixtures drift from CapabilityRegistry schema
[analytical][MEDIUM] Preload exposes channels without an ipcMain adapter in the bootstrap path
[analytical-round2][MEDIUM] Replay e2e tests synthesize stage lifecycle in the harness
[analytical][HIGH] Navigation allowlist accepts localhost prefix spoofing
[analytical][MEDIUM] Renderer hardening validator does not model exact navigation origins

usage_hints: jq '.plan.tracks | length' - Number of parallel execution tracks
jq '.plan.tracks[0].items | map(.id)' - First track item IDs
jq '.plan.tracks[].items[] | select(.unblocks | length > 0)' - Items that unblock others
jq '[.plan.tracks[].items[]] | length' - Total items across all tracks
